div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

This document describes Sensotrend's implementation of the HL7 FHIR IPS format of the International Patient Summary (IPS) specification both as a client app and as a FHIR server. It also includes and extensive example patient summary for Mikael Rinnetmäki, the author and the patient.

title.value: International Patient Summary for Mikael Rinnetmäki

description.value: This document describes Sensotrend's implementation of the [HL7 FHIR IPS](https://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/) format of the [International Patient Summary (IPS)](https://international-patient-summary.net/) specification both as a client app and as a FHIR server. It also includes and extensive example patient summary for Mikael Rinnetmäki, the author and the patient.

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

description.value: Dysphonia due to vocal cord problems
Disputed diagnosis of disease in larynx
Consent for the use of my data in healthcare
Consent for the use of *de-identified information* for research, including machine learning training
Deny the use of my data for marketing
Deny the use of *re-identifiable* data for machine learning training
Abbott Freestyle Libre 3 continuous glucose monitoring system
CamAPS hybrid closed loop insulin delivery system algorithm
Dexcom G6 continuous glucose monitoring system
mylife Loop automated insulin delivery system
Use of the CamAPS FX hybrid closed loop insulin delivery system algorithm since October 6, 2023
Use of the Dexcom G6 continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) system since October 6, 2023 until November 30, 2024
Use of the Abbott Freestyle Libre 3 continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) system since November 30, 2024
Use of the mylife Loop automated insulin delivery system since October 6, 2023
Use of the mylife YpsoPump insulin pump since October 6, 2023
International Patient Summary for Mikael as a FHIR Bundle
I use Rosuvastatin and Ezetimibe for diabetes related hypercholesterolemia.
I use Insulin Novorapid for Type 1 diabetes
I use Rosuvastatin and Ezetimibe for diabetes related hypercholesterolemia.
Observation of alcohol use for Mikael
Observation of B -Leuk (leukosyytit eli valkosolut) for Mikael
Observation of E -MCH (hemoglobiini, keskimassa) for Mikael
Observation of E -MCV (keskimääräinen punasolun tilavuus) for Mikael
Observation of E -RDW (punasolujen kokojakauma) for Mikael
Observation of P -AT3 (antitrombiini III) for Mikael
Observation of P -B2GPAbG (beeta-2-glykoproteiini, IgG-vasta-aineet) for Mikael
Observation of P -B2GPAbM (beeta-2-glykoproteiini, IgM-vasta-aineet) for Mikael
Observation of P -KardAbG (kardiolipiini, IgG-vasta-aineet) for Mikael
Observation of P -KardAbM (kardiolipiini, IgM-vasta-aineet) for Mikael
Observation of P -LuakPTT (lupusantikoagulantti, PTT) for Mikael
Observation of P -LuakRVV (lupusantikoagulantti, dRVVT) for Mikael
Observation of P -PC (proteiini C) for Mikael
Observation of P -PS-AgV (proteiini S, antigeeni, vapaa) for Mikael
Observation of P -TT-INR (tromboplastiiniaika, INR-tulostus) for Mikael
Observation of P -TT-SPA (tromboplastiiniaika, SPA-tulostus) for Mikael
Observation of Pt-GFReEPI (glomerulussuodosnopeus, estimoitu) 1 for Mikael
Observation of Pt-GFReEPI (glomerulussuodosnopeus, estimoitu) 2 for Mikael
Observation of TrFeSat (transferriinin rautakyllästeisyys) for Mikael
Observation of tobacco use for Mikael
Observation of blood pressure for Mikael, performed at a clinic 2025-10-24 (1/2)
Observation of blood pressure for Mikael, performed at a clinic 2025-10-24 (2/2)
Observation of blood pressure for Mikael 2026-01-04T15:48:09+02:00
Observation of blood pressure for Mikael 2026-01-04T15:49:06+02:00
Surgical operation to fix a fraccture of the left ring finger
Declaration of the use of AI in the creation of this patient summary
Declaration of this patient summary being crafted by hand by the patient themselves
The metadata about the IPS Client implementation, including the supported resources and operations.
The metadata about the IPS Server implementation, including the supported resources and operations.
